violations.text: The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

Tomatoes, which were prepared in advance, were not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Per person in charge, tomatoes were sliced 4.5 hours prior to inspection. Tomatoes were voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment must schedule pest control services. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

Bread packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Bread was taken off the shelf and must not be sold on the shelf until labels are made. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Please email inspector pest control records. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible in the back ware-washing/food prep area. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Establishment to use food prep sink temporarily as hand sink until proper hand sink is installed. Vegetables to be washed at 3-bay sink in colander. Per PIC, hand sink will be installed September 15th, 2023. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/10/2023
The establishment does not have an allergen statement present for consumer awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2023

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible in the back ware-washing/food prep area. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2023

Chicken breast observed at 45 degrees Fahrenheit, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chicken was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023
